title: Knysna Montessori School Matric IEB examination results 2025
description: SCHOOL NEWS - Knysna Montessori School is...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

SCHOOL NEWS - Knysna Montessori School is proud to announce that our gr.12 students of 2024 have all excelled in their IEB National Senior Certificate examinations, achieving a100% pass rate. We extend our heartfelt congratulations to each student for their individual outstanding accomplishments, a testament to their hard work, dedication, and perseverance.


> Every learner has shown remarkable resilience and determination, essential qualities that will serve them well as they begin their next journey.


Their results reflect not only academic excellence but also embody the holistic growth central to Montessori philosophy; made possible by the unwavering support and commitment of our teachers and staff. Our gratitude goes to the parents and guardians who have walked this journey with us. Your partnership has been invaluable in creating an environment where students can thrive.

As our 16th year of matriculants move forward, we wish them every success in their future endeavours.

Whether pursuing further studies, entering the workforce or exploring new opportunities; we are confident that they are equipped with the skills and values necessary to make meaningful contributions to society.

Knysna Montessori School remains committed to nurturing the potential of every learner, fostering a love for lifelong learning, and preparing students to face the challenges of a dynamic world. We celebrate this milestone with pride and look forward to continuing our tradition in "preparation for life.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
